prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-TTX-2IN1REVERSERATCHET-BLK Product Type: WRENCH Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: ToolTreaux 2 in 1 Reversible Ratchet Torque Wrench with Rubber Handle, Black Description: Increase your efficiency and agility on the job with ToolTreaux’s 2 in 1 Reversible Ratchet Torque Wrench.

Measuring 4.5 inches in length, this lightweight reversible ratchet wrench creates exceptional torque, so you can work faster and tackle adjustments, even in small, hard to reach quarters. Designed and ideal for reaching those awkward and difficult places, the reversible ratchet wrench will allow you to access sports where standard wrenches won’t provide enough torque and swing, or just simple won’t fit!

Reversible, this ratchet torque wrench can easily switch between forward and backward directions, so tightening and loosening tasks can be done simultaneously without the need to switch tools. And, offering added convenience and customization, the ratchet wrench included a removable thumb wheel that is easy to take off and adapt for various projects or modifications.

Lastly, the reversible ratchet wrench includes a built in rubber handle, making for a secure and comfortable grip, helping to reduce hand fatigue, prevents slippage and ensures precise control when in use.

Take on tight spaces quickly and efficiently with ToolTreaux’s 2 in 1 Reversible Ratchet Torque Wrench. Included are ¼ inch bit holder, ¼ inch male socket and conveniently removable thumb wheel. Whether for electricians, mechanics, technicians, DIY home improvements or renovations, lawn care equipment, boating and so much more, pack this 2 in 1 reversible ratchet wrench in your tool bag for quick fixes when you need them most.

Note: Sockets and bits NOT included with purchase Search Terms: Hand mechanic electrician tools reversible ratchet torque wrench tool bag catch sprocket wheel cogwheel gifts for dad biking accessories cycling mountain bike home improvement lawn care equipment boating garage DIY home renovation Features: - 2 in 1 REVERSIBLE RATCHET TOOL: Create exceptional torque with ToolTreaux’s lightweight reversible ratchet tool; measuring just 4.5 inches, the ratchet wrench is ideal for awkward or hard to reach places; included are ¼ inch bit holder, ¼ inch male socket and removable thumb wheel - TOGGLE SLIDE FUNCTION: This ratchet wrench can easily switch between forward and reverse directions so tightening and loosening tasks can be done simultaneously and efficiently without having to switch between tools - REMOVABLE THUMB WHEEL: Offering added convenience and customization, the removable thumb wheel is easy to take off and adapt for all different types of projects - RUBBER HANDLE: Rubber handle means a secure and comfortable grip, helps to reduce hand fatigue, prevents slippage and ensures precise control when in use - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 4.5 x 0.75 x 0.75 inches; Weight: 0.14lbs; Color: Black; Material: Metal; Note: Sockets and bits not included with purchase === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ToolTreaux 2 in 1 Reversible Ratchet Torque Wrench Black
